appraisal_events.evidence: « Il ne pense déjà plus à ce qu'il vous a dit. Tenez, partez, profitez vite pendant qu'il a le dos tourné. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme de Villeparisis warns that Charlus has already forgotten his promise and urges a discreet exit, casting him as fickle and unreliable.

status_effects.explanation: Locally diminished as capricious and forgetful per Mme de Villeparisis’s warning.
